# Prism — Prompt Engineering Agent Skill

> Treat your prompts like code. Prism optimizes, sanitizes, and scores prompts
> before they reach the model — living inside Cursor, Claude Code, or GitHub Copilot.
> No subscription. No new tools. Zero data leaves your platform.

## Install (2 commands)

**macOS / Linux:**
```bash
git clone https://github.com/CraigHutchinson/Prism ~/.prism-skill
python ~/.prism-skill/configure.py
```

**Windows (PowerShell):**
```powershell
git clone https://github.com/CraigHutchinson/Prism "$env:USERPROFILE\.prism-skill"
python "$env:USERPROFILE\.prism-skill\configure.py"
```

`configure.py` with no arguments:
- Installs for **all three platforms** (Cursor → global `~/.cursor/skills/`, Claude Code → project `.claude/skills/`, Copilot → project `.github/`)
- Runs `pip install -r requirements.txt` automatically
- Runs a 10-point health check and prints a fix hint for any failure

Pass a platform name to install selectively: `configure.py cursor`, `configure.py claude`, `configure.py copilot`.

**Restart Cursor** after running if you are installing for Cursor.

## First command after install

```
/prism hello
```

Prints an interactive intro, the three pillars, and a live Stage 1 + Stage 2 demo.

## Key commands

| Command | What it does | Model cost |
|---------|-------------|-----------|
| `/prism improve "..."` | Full pipeline: sanitize → score → restructure → rewrite with Why Log | Fast × 3 + Capable × 1 |
| `/prism hook on` | Enable pre-flight scan on every prompt you submit | None (script) |
| `/prism hook off` | Disable hooks | — |
| `/prism sanitize "..."` | Privacy & security scan — flags personal data, API keys, injection | None (script) |
| `/prism score "..."` | 5-dimension Agentic Readiness Score (0–100) + improvement tips | Fast model |
| `/prism explain "..."` | Diagnose a prompt's weaknesses without rewriting it | Fast model |
| `/prism patterns` | Analyse your personal prompt writing habits | Fast model |
| `/prism usage` | Show 30-session token overhead history | None |

## The three pillars

- **Refraction** — Restructures prompts: XML tags, CoT triggers, task decomposition, output constraints
- **Sanitization** — Scans for PII, API keys, and prompt injection *before* any model call (pure regex, zero cost)
- **Introspection** — Scores 0–100 across 5 dimensions; learns your personal writing patterns over time

## Verify the install

```bash
python ~/.prism-skill/scripts/verify_install.py        # macOS / Linux
python "$env:USERPROFILE\.prism-skill\scripts\verify_install.py"  # Windows PowerShell
```

A healthy install prints: `All 10 checks passed. Prism is ready.`

## Check installation status

```bash
python ~/.prism-skill/configure.py status
```

## Update

```bash
cd ~/.prism-skill && git pull
python configure.py --force    # re-copy updated files into place
```

## Uninstall

```bash
python ~/.prism-skill/configure.py remove cursor
python ~/.prism-skill/configure.py remove claude
python ~/.prism-skill/configure.py remove copilot
```

## Documentation

- Full README: https://github.com/CraigHutchinson/Prism/blob/main/README.md
- Source: https://github.com/CraigHutchinson/Prism
